description_long: This storage tank is a large, rectangular, open-topped structure constructed primarily from weathered wooden planks, reinforced at the corners and edges with vertical and horizontal metal supports. The wood appears aged and stained, giving the tank a rugged, utilitarian look suitable for outdoor or industrial environments. The tank is divided into three horizontal sections, each formed by thick wooden boards, and the interior is spacious and unobstructed. A prominent metal ladder is attached to one side, providing access to the interior from the ground. The tank's open top and robust build suggest it is designed for bulk storage of materials or waste. The overall construction is sturdy, with visible fasteners and joints, and the tank is elevated slightly above the ground.
description: A large, open-topped rectangular wooden storage tank with metal reinforcements and an attached access ladder. The tank is weathered and robust, suitable for industrial or urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden planks, metal corner supports, and the open top of the tank.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered wooden construction and the depth of the tank.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring the attached metal ladder and a clear view into the open interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden panels and metal supports, similar to the other side.
